title: Software Engineer
description:

title: SQA Engineer
description:
**Department:** 
 Information Technology
   

  

**Location:** 
 APAC\\-India\\-IT Delivery Center Hyderabad
   

  

**Description**
**About this opportunity**
 Software Quality Assurance Engineer (SQA Engineer)
   

  

 Our Enterprise Team Envisions, Creates And Build Tests To Perform Verification Of Enterprise System Solutions That Drive Better Business Processes. The SQA Group At Align Technology Needs SQA For The FinanceApp Group To Help Create And Test Enterprise System Solutions That Drive Better Business Processes. We Are Looking For People With The Following Characteristics
   

  

* Improve quality
* A willingness to do what it takes to get the job done
* A stubborn devotion to being the best
* Strong consulting, customer management skills or a desire to learn
* Fanatical ability to deliver customer satisfaction.


 As a member of the team, you will be involved in developing, testing, launching and iterating upon Integrated System components. You are able to think creatively about how to use technology to streamline and drive processes that are backbone of business process and in turn can take your ideas from concept through to impeccable execution. Ability to understand, develop automation frameworks, strong analytical troubleshooting skills, and the ability to interact with users is a must have.
   

  

 We are looking for passionate Software Quality Assurance Engineer for our Engineering Team to be part of Quality (SQA) group, who is excited about joining a team that is execution oriented, fast moving and implementing the cutting\\-edge software architectural components. In this position, you will be a part of the team responsible for verifying \\& validation of Enterprise SAP system services for Order to Cash flows, Invoicing, Billing, Pricing, job processing, various products ERP test scenarios and will work with a wide scope of different finance applications \\& teams.
   

  

**Role expectations**
**In this role, you will…**
* Be responsible for verifying the configuration and deployment of SAP and Apttus applications into test environments for multiple projects.
* Work closely with software developers, your peers in SQA, Project managers, and a diverse group of cross\\-functional teams including software, I.T., and Finance
* Provide support for corporate business SAP and Apttus applications in a QA environment.
* Frequently and effectively communicate with business and technical staff members will be essential.
* Analyze project documents in order to prepare effective test plans and execute test cases for SAP and Apttus applications.
* Publish project sites, plans, and documentation using tools such as Excel, Word, wikis, and MS Project
* Dependability: Meets commitments, works independently, accepts accountability, handles change, sets personal standards, stays focused under pressure.
* Initiative: Tackles problems and takes independent action, seeks out new responsibilities, acts on opportunities, generates new ideas, practices self\\-development
* Work closely with the software development team to implement testing methods and validate test cases. Ensure direct ‘black box’ testing is complementary to what is being covered by unit and ‘white box’ testing.
* Develop and maintain product test plans and test scripts that are effective at trapping defects so other team members can run them with confidence.
* Assist in understanding and replicating customer issues.
* Excellent communication skills.
* Ability to work with databases, automation infrastructure, cloud\\-based services.
* Ability to work with globally distributed teams.
* Ability to analyse project requirements and plan automation deliverables.
* Problem Solver: Ready to be challenged and take pride in finding innovative and unique ways to solve a problem. Able to deal with setbacks in a positive way and can solve problem on the fly.
* Teamwork: Ability to balance team and individual responsibilities. Willing to go the extra mile to accomplish team goals.
* Dependability: Meets commitments, works independently, accepts accountability, handles change, sets personal standards, stays focused under pressure.


**What We're Looking For**
**In this role, you’ll need …**
* Exposure to SAP Enterprise process and features involved, along with domain understanding in Systems modules to perform functional and Non\\-functional testing experience.
* Ability to understand software architecture and enterprise applications.
* Strong interpersonal communication skills with an ability to build relationships and work across multi\\-functional organizations.
* Ability to think creatively about how to use technology to streamline and drive processes that are backbone of business process and in turn can take your ideas from concept through to impeccable execution.
* Natural ability to speak and write effectively at all organizational levels.
* The ability to perform under pressure situations, while developing sound implementation approaches which solve the business problem or environment which they support.
* Must have experience with ERP testing, preferred SAP OTC module, or sales order processing working experience including knowledge on shipping \\& invoicing.
* Must have the ability to understand major systems integration between SAP and other integrated systems.
* Working knowledge of SFDC/Apttus or similar applications, including Customer Master, Order Management, Pricing, Discounts, promotions
* Have a good understanding of corporate financial concepts and accounting procedures, including advanced pricing, discounting, revenue deferral and recognition, cost accounting, GL, AP/AR, credit/debit processing.
* Healthy engineering mindset, developing clean code for documentation and maintainability.
* Passion for improvements, innovation, optimization
* Working experience of Agile methodology SDLC model like Scrum, Kanban. Etc.


**EDUCATION And/or EXPERIENCE**
* BS degree or equivalent years of experience
* 5\\+ years of Testing IT experience in Software Quality Assurance
* Minimum 2\\+ years of SAP functional experience in SD or OTC modules, MM \\& FICO experience optional.


**Applicant Privacy Policy**
 Review our
 **Applicant Privacy Policy** 
 for additional information.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Statement**
 Align Technology is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities in all our practices, without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, marital status, protected veteran status, age, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other legally protected category. Applicants must be legally authorized to work in the country for which they are applying, and employment eligibility will be verified as a condition of hire.

title: Principal RTL Engineer – FPGA Debug & EDA Architecture
description:
About Lattice
 



 At Lattice, we believe in building technology with focus and intent.
 



 We develop
 **low\\-power programmable solutions** 
 that enable innovation across edge AI, connectivity, and security. Our teams work across silicon, software, and systems—with a strong emphasis on
 **ownership, speed, and real impact** 
 .
 



 Here, engineers don’t just contribute to parts of a system—they help define
 **how the system works end\\-to\\-end** 
 , including the tools that bring silicon to life.
 



  





 We’re looking for a
 **Principal RTL Engineer** 
 to lead the architecture and development of
 **FPGA debug infrastructure** 
 within Lattice’s tool ecosystem.
 



 This is a unique opportunity to work on
 **on\\-chip debug, observability, and instrumentation capabilities** 
 , shaping how engineers analyze and optimize designs on Lattice platforms.
 



 You’ll operate at the intersection of
 **RTL, FPGA architecture, and tooling** 
 , with the ability to influence both
 **design and user experience** 
 .
 



  





 What You’ll Do
 


* Architect and develop
 **FPGA debug engines and instrumentation IP**
* Define scalable
 **debug and observability frameworks** 
 for complex designs
* Translate product requirements into
 **robust RTL architectures and specifications**
* Drive RTL implementation with strong focus on
 **performance, usability, and integration into tool flows**
* Collaborate with
 **software, UI, and validation teams** 
 to deliver cohesive debug experiences
* Influence
 **EDA workflows and debug methodologies** 
 across the stack
* Guide silicon bring\\-up and ensure
 **alignment between design and debug capabilities**
* Mentor engineers and elevate
 **design and architecture practices**



  





 What You Bring
 


* 12\\+ years of experience in
 **RTL design and FPGA\\-based systems**
* Strong expertise in
 **SystemVerilog/Verilog (or VHDL)**
* Deep experience in
 **FPGA debug, bring\\-up, and design visibility**
* Hands\\-on experience with
 **simulation, synthesis, and debug tool flows**
* Strong understanding of
 **hardware\\-software interaction in debug environments**
* Experience with complex protocols such as:
* PCIe, Ethernet, DDR, SerDes
* Proficiency in scripting/programming (
 **Python, TCL, C/C\\+\\+** 
 )
* Proven ability to
 **drive architecture and influence system\\-level design**



  





 Nice to Have
 


* Experience contributing to
 **debug frameworks, instrumentation, or design visibility features**
* Exposure to environments focused on
 **EDA tooling or FPGA platforms**
* Strong interest in improving
 **developer workflows and productivity**



  





 Why This Role
 


* Opportunity to define
 **how FPGA designs are debugged and analyzed**
* High ownership in a
 **focused, high\\-impact team environment**
* Work across
 **RTL, architecture, and tooling—not just one layer**
* Visibility into
 **end\\-to\\-end silicon and tool interaction**
